Good morning, Sarah. Welcome to Grupo Picunha. I am a lawyer and director here. Our company operates in iron and agriculture. Could we arrange a meeting this afternoon? There is a conference room next to my office.

Good morning. My name is Rafael Gasparello Lima. I am a lawyer and director at Grupo Picunha. Our headquarters is in São Paulo. We operate in two main industries: iron manufacturing and agriculture, and our revenue comes from both divisions.

Welcome to our building. There are ten floors here. My office is on the fifth floor. There is a conference room next to my office, and there are three meeting rooms on this floor. The cafeteria is on the first floor, and there is a large parking lot behind the building.
